item.title: Bitcoin verstehen вАУ Episode 317 - Bitcoin-Steuern in Deutschland: Was passiert mit der Haltefrist? Mit Tami M√ґnnig
item.description:
In dieser Folge sprechen wir mit Krypto-Steuerexpertin Tami M√ґnnig √Љber die aktuelle Diskussion rund um die Bitcoin-Haltefrist in Deutschland. In den letzten Wochen haben mehrere Parteien Vorschl√§ge eingebracht, die einj√§hrige Haltefrist f√Љr Kryptowerte abzuschaffen вАУ von der SPD bis zu den Gr√Љnen. Noch ist nichts beschlossen, aber die Debatte l√§uft.

Wir ordnen ein, wer was will, warum √Цsterreich als warnendes Beispiel gilt und was das alles f√Љr deutsche Bitcoin-Investoren bedeutet. Au√Яerdem sprechen wir √Љber DAC8, die neue EU-Richtlinie, die ab 2027 dazu f√Љhrt, dass Transaktionsdaten aller Krypto-Investoren automatisch an die Finanzbeh√ґrden gemeldet werden. Was das konkret bedeutet und wie man sich jetzt richtig aufstellt, erkl√§rt Tami im Detail.

рЯФЧ LINKS ZUR FOLGE

- Alle Informationen zur Initiative PROHALTEFRIST
- Weitere Infos zu Tami
- Tami auf LinkedIn
- Bitcoin: Steuern beim Kauf, Mining & Bezahlen mit Tami M√ґnnig
- Bitcoin & Finanzamt: So vermeidest du Probleme beim Verkaufen & Vererben! Mit Tami M√ґnnig
- Zu unserem Newsletter anmelden
- Alle Infos zur BTCPrague 2026 (10 % Rabatt mit unserem Code BTCVERSTEHEN)

рЯУЛ TIMESTAMPS

(00:00:00) Einleitung

(00:01:03) Der aktuelle Stand bei Steuern & Bitcoin in Deutschland

(00:11:23) Blick in andere L√§nder

(00:15:19) Petition & Beweggr√Љnde der Politik

(00:18:54) Was ist die DAC8-Richtlinie?

(00:28:25) Non-KYC-Plattformen als L√ґsung?

(00:31:00) √Дnderung der aktuellen steuerlichen Behandlung

(00:44:38) Wie sollte man sich nun verhalten?

]]>

item.title: Was Bitcoin bringt - mit Niko Jilch вАУ Der Bitcoin Crash l√§√Яt diesen Finanz-Insider v√ґllig kalt (zoom out!) | Jonas Benner
item.description:
Der Bitcoin-Preis ist unter die Marke von 60.000 Dollar gekracht und die Stimmung am Markt ist sichtlich abgek√Љhlt, w√§hrend das gro√Яe Risikokapital in den aktuellen KI-Hype und anstehende Tech-IPOs flieht. Gemeinsam mit Jonas Benner, Quant-Analyst bei einem der gr√ґ√Яten australischen Pensionsfonds, analysiere ich die aktuelle Marktstruktur, den Einfluss von ETFs und warum dieser B√§renmarkt sich fundamental von vergangenen Zyklen unterscheidet. Wir werfen einen Blick auf das erfolgreiche australische Vorsorgemodell, das als erste gro√Яe Kasse aktiv in Bitcoin investiert hat, und besprechen die langfristigen makro√ґkonomischen Trends wie Deglobalisierung und die unaufhaltsame Staatsverschuldung, die Bitcoin als ultimatives, unkorreliertes und knappes Wertspeichermedium unumg√§nglich machen.

item.title: Simply Bitcoin вАУ Did Bitcoin's 53% Fall Front Run the A.I. Market Collapse? | Simply Originals
item.description:

While Wall Street celebrates trillion-dollar IPOs, AI euphoria, and record valuations, liquidity may already be leaving the system. If Bitcoin is the most sensitive asset in global markets, this crash could be the warning shot everyone else is ignoring.Click here to learn more about what's coming: https://news.simplybitcoin.com/launch

item.title: The Bitcoin Matrix вАУ Rehypothecation Is Cryptographically Impossible вАФ Martin Matejka, Firefish CEO
item.description:
"Rehypothecation is cryptographically impossible."

Martin Matejka joins the show to break down the rise of Bitcoin-native lending, Firefish's 3-of-3 multisig + DLC architecture, and why the February 6 stress test was the day Bitcoin-backed credit grew up.

We discuss why rehypothecation can be engineered out rather than promised away, how Firefish thinks about LTV, margin-call cadence, and the three warnings before liquidation, and why $160 million in non-custodial loans across 27,000 users in 70 countries is the proof a Bitcoin-native lender can scale.

Subscribe so you never miss an episode.

рЯОЩпЄП GUEST

Martin Matejka, Co-founder & CEO of Firefish вЖТ firefish.io

Firefish on X вЖТ x.com/Firefish_io

рЯТ∞ SPONSORS & DISCOUNTS

рЯРЯ Firefish вАФ Don't sell your Bitcoin. Live off it. Non-custodial Bitcoin-backed loans. Your keys stay in 3-of-3 multisig. Rehypothecation is cryptographically impossible. $160M+ facilitated. 27,000+ users across 70 countries. firefish.io/?ref=MATRIX | code MATRIX

рЯФС Stamp Seed вАФ Between 3-6 million Bitcoin are lost forever. Most of it paper. Hammer your seed words into solid titanium вАФ fire-resistant to 3,000¬∞F. 15% OFF stampseed.com | code MATRIX

рЯЯ† Club Orange вАФ The location-based social network built for the Bitcoin community. Find Bitcoiners, meetups, and merchants near you. Download in the App Store or Google Play. cluborange.org/matrix-podcast

рЯПХпЄП Camp Nakamoto вАФ Bitcoin summer camp. Private island. Lake Winnipesaukee, NH. June 18-21. I'll be speaking there. 15% OFF campnakamoto.com | code MATRIX

рЯФР Unchained вАФ 90,000+ BTC secured in collaborative multisig since 2016. Bitcoin-only. Never lent out a sat. IRAs, loans, inheritance planning. 10% OFF unchained.com/matrix | code MATRIX10

рЯТО River вАФ Buy Bitcoin the right way. Up to $100 FREE Bitcoin. river.com/matrixрЯП• CrowdHealth вАФ Ditch your fiat health insurance like my family did. Join us at CrowdHealth. joincrowdhealth.com | code MATRIX

рЯЫ°пЄП Meanwhile вАФ The world's first Bitcoin life insurance policy. Premiums and payouts in Bitcoin. meanwhile.bm | code YTPFYD

рЯЩП SUPPORT THE SHOW

вЪ° Strike вЖТ BitcoinMatrix@strike.me

рЯТµ PayPal вЖТ paypal.biz/BitcoinMatrix

рЯТЪ Cash App вЖТ cash.app/$BitcoinMatrix

рЯТЬ Venmo вЖТ venmo.com/u/bitcoinmatrix

рЯУђ PO Box вЖТ The Bitcoin Matrix, P.O. Box 18056, Sarasota, FL 34231

рЯУ± FOLLOW

рЯМР Website вЖТ TheBitcoinMatrix.com

рЯР¶ Cedric on X вЖТ x.com/cedyoungelman

рЯР¶ Show on X вЖТ x.com/_bitcoinmatrix

рЯЯ£ Nostr вЖТ npub12tq9jxmt707gd5vnce3tqllpm67ktr0mqskcvy58qqa4d074pz9s4ukdcs

item.title: The Wolf Of All Streets вАУ Bitcoin Just Hit The 2022 Bottom Signal At $62K вАУ 10M Underwater
item.description:
Bitcoin just triggered the signal that has marked every previous bear market bottom вАФ half of all circulating BTC supply (roughly 10.5 million coins) is now trading at a loss per Glassnode/K33 Research, the first time this has happened since the late 2022 cycle low. But realized losses over the last 30 days sit at just 187,000 BTC versus 1.2 million after the FTX collapse, meaning capitulation hasn't actually hit yet. Meanwhile, Japan just delivered the biggest bullish policy shift of 2026 вАФ reclassifying crypto as financial products, slashing the tax rate from 55% to 20%, and opening the door to spot crypto ETFs. Add Wall Street dumping $10.8 billion of tech stocks last week (largest tech outflow ever recorded), SoftBank trying to borrow $6 billion against its OpenAI stake just to keep funding OpenAI, Warren's Hail Mary to delay tomorrow's $75B SpaceX IPO, and the historical reality that the 10 biggest IPOs in history dropped 35% in their first six months вАФ and today's setup may be the cleanest historic bottom signal we've seen in three years. We break down whether the supply-in-loss signal actually holds, why capitulation hasn't fully hit yet, what Japan's bombshell means for the bull case, and which catalysts could trigger the real cycle bottom before $50K comes into play.

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: What Bitcoin Did вАУ How The State Makes Us Poorer | Max Hillebrand
item.description:
"We are taught that the state builds our economy, but the reality is that every act of intervention is an act of wealth destruction."

Max Hillebrand joins the show to tear down the Keynesian fallacies that keep us in a cycle of manufactured poverty and systemic theft. We go deep into the Austrian framework to explain why privacy isn't just a tech feature, it is the bedrock of a free economy.

We discuss:\

  • The Theft Trap: Why taxation and inflation are definitionally coercion, and how they silently redistribute wealth from the productive to the state. \
  • The Broken Window Fallacy: Why building things we donвАЩt need and destroying wealth through war is the ultimate economic delusion. \
  • The Consumption Trap: How state-manipulated metrics like GDP force us to prioritise over-consumption over the savings required for actual prosperity. \
  • The Minimum Wage Fallacy: A practical breakdown of why state interventions inevitably price the most vulnerable workers out of the market. \
  • The Cypherpunk Solution: Why increasing the cost of state attack and decreasing the cost of private defense is our only path to an unstoppable, parallel economy.

THANKS TO OUR SPONSORS:

ANCHORWATCH

BLOCKWARE

LEDN

BITKEY

SWAN

CAPE

FOLLOW:

Danny Knowles: https://x.com/\_DannyKnowles or https://primal.net/danny

Max Hillebrand: https://towardsliberty.com/

The Praxeology of Privacy: https://towardsliberty.com/pop

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Frontier вАУ Inside Wall StreetвАЩs bitcoin playbook with Denny Galindo
item.description:
Denny is a wealth manager and bitcoin research lead at Morgan Stanley, where he bridges traditional finance and bitcoin for high-net-worth investors. He operates inside one of the worldвАЩs largest financial institutions while developing frameworks to help advisors understand and allocate to bitcoin.

In this episode, Denny joins The Bitcoin Frontier to share how investors should think about bitcoin in a portfolio, the three core investor buckets driving adoption, and his thoughts on determining whether youвАЩre underweight or overweight bitcoin. We dig into bitcoinвАЩs market cycles and seasonal framework, the role of global money supply in driving returns, and practical strategies for gaining exposure in a volatile asset.

SUPPORT THE PODCAST:

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 вАУ Intro & DennyвАЩs role bridging traditional finance and bitcoin
2:00 вАУ From equity research to leading bitcoin insights at Morgan Stanley
4:20 вАУ The three investor buckets: digital gold, venture, and diversifier
7:30 вАУ How institutions evaluate volatility and correlation
10:50 вАУ Where bitcoin fits in portfolios today (risk asset vs store of value)
14:00 вАУ How to determine if youвАЩre underweight or overweight bitcoin
18:00 вАУ Why most investors are still early (0вАУ4% allocation range)
21:40 вАУ Will the three investor frameworks converge over time?
23:10 вАУ Bitcoin cycles: macro liquidity vs halving-driven supply shocks
26:30 вАУ Using cycles for rebalancing vs long-term holding strategies
31:20 вАУ Tail risks: quantum computing and вАЬearthquakeвАЭ scenarios
36:10 вАУ Bitcoin as a global store of value and M2-driven returns
41:10 вАУ Modeling long-term returns: monetary expansion + adoption
48:30 вАУ How to build a position: dollar-cost averaging and timing
52:15 вАУ Seasons of bitcoin: winter, spring, and portfolio adjustments
55:00 вАУ What it takes for bitcoin to become a standard portfolio allocation

WHERE TO FOLLOW US:

вЖТ Timot LamarreвАЩs Twitter: https://x.com/TimotLamarre¬†

item.title: Unchained вАУ The Chopping Block: Zcash Infinite Mint Bug + AI Hackers vs Formal Verification + NEAR's Agent Vision
item.description:
Mert and Illia autopsy a brutal weekend in crypto: Saylor's $3M test sale that taught him there's no sell button, the Zcash bug Claude found that could've minted unlimited counterfeit ZEC, formal verification as the bulwark against AI attackers, and whether NEAR's agentic commerce vision is real.

Welcome to The Chopping Block вАФ where crypto insiders Haseeb Qureshi, Tom Schmidt, Tarun Chitra, and Robert Leshner chop it up about the latest in crypto. This week we've got two heavy hitters: NEAR Protocol co-founder Illia Polosukhin and Helius founder Mert Mumtaz.

We kick things off with the weekend market meltdown -- Saylor sold 32 BTC for the first time in four years, STRC is trading below par, and Mert argues the real damage is that Saylor sucks all the air out of the room for actual crypto innovation. Then we get into the biggest story of the week: a critical bug discovered in Zcash's Orchard ZK circuit using Claude Opus 4.8 that could have allowed infinite counterfeit minting inside the shielded pool. Mert walks us through the emergency soft fork, the Ironwood migration, and why formal verification is about to become table stakes. Illia makes the case that AI-powered attackers have a permanent asymmetric advantage and that we need real-time on-chain detection systems to survive. Tom coins the analogy of the episode: we're moving from building boats to building spaceships. We close with Illia's pitch for NEAR's agent commerce vision вАУ $240M in single-day volume, private intents, and the claim that agent-to-agent trustless commerce is already live вАУ while Mert remains a friendly skeptic. Let's get into it.
Listen to the episode on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, Pods, Fountain, Podcast Addict, Pocket Casts, Amazon Music, or on your favorite podcast platform.


Hosts

в≠РпЄПHaseeb Qureshi, Managing Partner at Dragonfly¬†

в≠РпЄПTom Schmidt, General Partner at Dragonfly¬†


Guest

в≠РпЄП Mert, Co-founder & CEO at Helius

в≠РпЄП Illia Polosukhin, Co-founder of NEAR Protocol


Timestamps

00:00 Intro

01:17 Weekend Crypto Meltdown & Bitcoin Crash

02:52 Saylor, STRC & the DAT Death Spiral Fears

11:51 "No Sell Button" вАФ Saylor's Lesson Learned

13:14 Zcash Bug: 50% Crash Explained

20:30 The Fix: Ironwood Pool & Formal Verification

23:11 AI vs Crypto Security: The Attacker Advantage

27:21 What Is Formal Verification?

30:07 Spaceship-Grade Smart Contract Security

31:36 OPSEC, Oracles & Anomaly Detection

36:08 Cypherpunk Dilemma: Stop the Hack or Not?

38:37 Will DeFi Survive? Long Math

42:49 NEAR's AI Agents & Intents Vision

48:43 Is Agentic Commerce Real? Mert's Skepticism


Disclosures

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible.DE - Die besten Bitcoin-Artikel, vorgelesen in deutscher Sprache! вАУ 208. Martin Connor - Bitcoin, das ultimative Kollateral
item.description:
von Martin Connor вАУ Originaltitel: ¬ЂBitcoin: The Ultimate Collateral¬Ђ

*вАЮDie beste, einfachste вАУ ultimative вАУ Form der Kreditsicherheit ist etwas, das sofort beansprucht und verkauft werden kann, wenn der Schuldner seine Zahlungen nicht leistet. Der Verkauf eines Hauses kann Monate oder sogar Jahre dauern. Auch Aktien haben zeitliche Beschr√§nkungen. Bitcoin jedoch nicht. Bitcoin ist immer in BewegungвАЬ
*

(Martin Connor)

Wenn man Bitcoin als hartes, in seinem Kern nicht ver√§nderbares oder manipulierbares Asset begreift, welche M√ґglichkeiten er√ґffnen sich dadurch? Das Buch вАЮBitcoin: Die ultimative KreditsicherheitвАЬ untersucht, wie die Bereiche Bitcoin und Kreditvergabe perfekt zusammenpassen. Etwa, wie Bitcoin-Besitzer und Bitcoin-Unternehmen den maximalen Wert aus ihren Bitcoins herausholen k√ґnnen, ohne sie verkaufen zu m√Љssen.

Wir lesen ein Kapitel aus diesem Buch, das eine zentrale Idee beleuchtet: Bitcoin als die beste Sicherheit, die die Menschheit je hatte. Die meisten Menschen denken beim Thema ¬ЂSicherheit¬ї an H√§user, Aktien, Gold und Bargeld вАУ aber weil es scheinbar nichts Besseres gab, √Љbersehen sie deren enorme Schw√§chen. Die Kombination der Elemente von Multisignatur вАУ echtes gemeinsames Eigentum, perfekte digitale Knappheit, Portabilit√§t und die un√Љbertroffene Verf√Љgbarkeit von Bitcoin вАУ unterscheidet es grundlegend von herk√ґmmlichen Besicherungsmodellen.

Verkaufe Deine Bitcoins niemals вАУ lebe davon.

Weitere Empfehlungen:

  • Pierre Rochard: ¬ЂDer Nutzen des Sparens¬ї (Ep. #019)
  • Tomer Strolight: ¬ЂWarum Bitcoin?¬ї (Ep. #80-82)
  • Saifedean Ammous: ¬ЂF√Љr eine R√Љckkehr zu niedriger Zeitpr√§ferenz¬ї (Ep. #77)
  • Pierre Rochard: ¬ЂBitcoin vs. Gold¬ї (Ep. #71)
  • Hans-Hermann Hoppe: ¬ЂDer Ertrag aus gespartem Geld вАУ neu √Љberdacht¬ї (Ep. #18)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂDie ¬ЂBezahlвАШ mich in Bitcoin!¬ї-Theorie¬ї (#140)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂBitcoin-Zahlungen: Die вАєJemand ist der N√§chsteвАЇ-Logik¬ї (#151)
  • HodlHodl.com f√Љr Belehnung von Bitcoin, ebenso wie Unchained Capital, Ledn, Firefish etc.

Abonniere BitcoinAudible.de und empfehle unsere Vorlesungen jedem, der/die sich f√Љr Bitcoin interessiert. Hilf damit auch anderen, Bitcoin von einem starken monet√§ren, wirtschaftlichen und philosophischen Fundament aus zu erkunden.

Unterst√Љtze bitte unser Projekt und sende uns Sats via Lightning oder n√Љtze eine der anderen Optionen.

Tipp: Bitcoin nur mehr KYC-frei kaufen! Auf HodlHodl.com ist das recht einfach, und mit Anmeldung √Љber den obigen Link reduziert Du dar√Љber hinaus sogar auch die Spesen f√Љr Deine ersten K√§ufe dort.

]]>

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News вАУ Everyone Is Dead Wrong About Saylor and MSTR (No One Is Seeing This) | Dan Hillery
item.description:
Everyone has Saylor's trade completely wrong. The bears think it's a Ponzi. The bulls think it's invincible. Dan Hilery says both sides are missing the actual numbers and the real story is more interesting than either of them.

Bitcoin is at $62,000. MSTR is trading where it was two years ago. STRC has broken its $100 par and is sitting in the low nineties. The shorts are piling in, put volume is three times the calls, and Peter Schiff is calling the whole thing a Ponzi.

But Dan Hilery says everyone is looking at this completely wrong. And he has the numbers to prove it.

Here's what we get into:

вАҐ Why the MSTR short thesis has a fatal flaw that almost no one is talking about

вАҐ How Strategy selling Bitcoin made headlines while the 50x buyback was barely mentioned

вАҐ Why STRC breaking par is not the death spiral signal the bears think it is

вАҐ What the put to call ratio actually tells you about positioning and why it could be the setup up for a violent short squeeze

вАҐ The real math behind Strategy's Bitcoin treasury model and why the numbers still work at $62,000

вАҐ Why this moment looks a lot more like a buying opportunity than a blowup

вАҐ What has to happen for MSTR to get back to all time highs вАФ and why Dan thinks the catalyst is closer than most people think

вАҐ Why Peter Schiff has been calling this a Ponzi from the beginning and why he will be wrong again

вАҐ The shorts are the loudest they have ever been. Dan says that is exactly when you want to be paying attention.

рЯФФ Subscribe for weekly Bitcoin and macro analysis.

рЯЯ£ Download the Rhino App рЯСЙ https://rhinobitcoin.onelink.me/66Ka/bnews

Use Promo Code: "BITCOINNEWS" for $10 of FREE Bitcoin

рЯФі Subscribe to our newsletter Bitcoin News Weekly [FREE]рЯСЙ https://bitcoinnews.com/subscribe

]]>

item.title: Stephan Livera Podcast вАУ Can You Actually Earn on Lightning? With Chris Ritter | SLP739
item.description:

item.title: Nodesignal - Deine Bitcoin-Frequenz вАУ Nodesignal-Talk - E284 - Meshnetzwerke 2.0
item.description:
In der heutigen Folge sprechen Thorsten und Zetti mit Meshimouse aka Curemici in einem Follow-Up √Љber Meshnetzwerke. Eine erste Folge zu dem Thema ist im vergangenen Jahr erschienen. Aufgrund der entstandenen Dynamik rund um Meshnetzwerke, insbesondere auch durch den Fokus einer der letzten Sovereign Engineering Kohorten, war wieder Zeit f√Љr eine neue Folge zu dem Thema. Meshimouse gibt ein Update zum Reticulum, einen Deepdive in eine neue Android App, die als mobiler Reticulum Client fungiert, was bei Meshtastic passiert ist und gibt einen Ausblick auf die kommenden Entwicklungen. 

Von und mit:

- Curemici

- Zettizettler

- Thorsten вЪ°пЄП

- Thorsten вЪ°пЄП(Cutting)

Chris Kline is the co-founder and COO of Bitcoin IRA. We also discuss the strategic bitcoin reserve, quantum computing fears, and the convergence of AI and crypto.

item.title: The Bitcoin Broadcast вАУ SmashFi CEO | Self Custody | ETF's | Younger Generations Waking Up | Brian Paik
item.description:
In this in-depth interview, Brian Paik from SmashFi shares his journey into Bitcoin, the evolution of his platform, and insights into Bitcoin investing, self-custody, and the future of Bitcoin companies. Discover how SmashFi is innovating in Bitcoin savings and the importance of self-custody in the Bitcoin space.We break down the core features of SmashFi: its intelligent trading algorithm, its focus on self-custody with integrations like Blockstream Jade, and how it aims to bring Bitcoin savings to Korea and beyondвАФadapting to US and Latin American markets with license strategies. Brian discusses the importance of self-custody, the pitfalls of Bitcoin treasury companies, and why he believes the future lies in Bitcoin-first companies that generate their own cash flow through mining and innovative financial strategies.Follow Me on X: https://x.com/HodlFloridaSubscribe on YouTube: вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™¬†@TheBTCBroadcast¬† Follow me on IG: https://www.instagram.com/thebitcoinbroadcast/Guest's Socials:X: https://x.com/brianhoonjongX Business Acct: https://x.com/SmashFiOfficialWebsite: https://smashfi.me/Sponsors:Protect Your Seed Phrase with MicroSeed: https://microseed.io/?ref=TBBUse Code "TBB" for 5% off your MicroSeedBitcoin Well: https://bitcoinwell.com/referral/vinc...Chapters00:00 Introduction to Bitcoin and Brian's Journey11:14 The Evolution of SmashFi and Its Unique Approach21:55 Understanding Bitcoin Savings Accounts and DCA Strategies33:02 Self-Custody and Wallet Preferences33:28 The Pros and Cons of Bitcoin ETFs38:21 The Dynamics of Bitcoin Treasury Companies45:43 Sustainability in Bitcoin Business Models54:22 Comparing Bitcoin Conferences: Korea vs. Las Vegas01:02:12 The Future of Bitcoin Adoption Among Younger GenerationsFor Entertainment Purposes Only. Not Financial Advice.#bitcoin #btc #investing #crypto #economy #ai

item.title: Dein Weg zu Bitcoin вАУ Frauen sind die bessern Investoren! - Traut (es) euch (zu)! вАУ Dein Weg zu Bitcoin mit Marie von Bose
item.description:
Marie hat genau das gemacht, was viele sich nicht trauen: Sie hat den sicheren Angestelltenjob hinter sich gelassen und sich als Crypto-Traderin selbstst√§ndig gemacht. Doch der eigentliche Wendepunkt kam mit einer einfachen Frage: вАЮWarum √Љberlasse ich meine Finanzen eigentlich anderen?"In dieser Folge erz√§hlt Marie ihre pers√ґnliche Reise вАУ von Glaubenss√§tzen ums Geld (вАЮ√Ьber Geld spricht man nicht"), √Љber erste zaghafte Schritte mit Altcoins bis hin zu einem klaren Bekenntnis: Bitcoin als Wertspeicher, der unabh√§ngig macht. Ein Gespr√§ch √Љber Mut, Vorbild sein, Geschichte (was hat 1977 mit deiner Freiheit zu tun?) вАУ und die Frage: Was geben wir der n√§chsten Generation eigentlich wirklich mit?

рЯІ† Themen in der Episode:вЬЕ Maries Weg vom Getreidehandel ins Crypto-Trading вЬЕ Warum Frauen am Kapitalmarkt untersch√§tzt werden вАУ und wo ihre echten St√§rken liegen вЬЕ Trading als Handwerk: Was es wirklich braucht (Spoiler: Geduld und viel Lernen) вЬЕ Blockchain im Alltag: Vom Konzertticket √Љber die Immobilie bis zur R√Љckverfolgbarkeit von Kaffee вЬЕ Glaubenss√§tze ums Geld вАУ und wie man sie aufl√ґst вЬЕ Pers√ґnlichkeitsentwicklung als вАЮEndgegner" beim Trading вЬЕ Warum 1977 ein Schl√Љsseljahr f√Љr finanzielle Selbstbestimmung war вЬЕ Vorbild f√Љr die eigenen T√ґchter sein вАУ und f√Љr andere Frauen

рЯТђ Zitat der Folge: вАЮBitcoin ist ein absolut genialer Wertspeicher, der mich maximal flexibel und unabh√§ngig sein l√§sst."рЯУ≤ Marie von Bose findet ihr hier:рЯФЧ Instagram: @cryptosaloon.techвЬ® Unser Ziel: Bitcoin verst√§ndlich und greifbar machen durch Geschichten, die jeder nachvollziehen kann und die zeigen, dass die ersten Schritte nicht gro√Я sein m√Љssen und dass jeder Zweifel am Anfang hatte. Gef√§llt dir die Folge?Dann lass ein рЯСН da, abonniere den Kanal und schick die Episode an jemanden, der das h√ґren sollte рЯЪАрЯУМ Schreib deine Fragen/Meinungen in die Kommentare вАУ wir lesen alles!вЪ° Unterst√Љtze den Podcast √Љber Fountain: Auf Fountain kannst du die Audio-Version h√ґren und mir freiwillig Sats per Lightning senden вАУ ganz ohne Werbung oder Abo. рЯСЙ https://fountain.fm/show/WdHajypwLY2JOQN2zH1SрЯУ≤ Folge uns auf Instagram: рЯФЧ IG J√Љrgen: https://www.instagram.com/finanz.bewusstsein Rechtlicher Hinweis / Disclaimer:Die Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschlie√Яlich der finanziellen Bildung, der allgemeinen Information und zur pers√ґnlichen Meinungs√§u√Яerung. Sie stellen keine Finanz- oder Anlageberatung im Sinne einschl√§giger Vorschriften dar.Alle dargestellten Inhalte spiegeln ausschlie√Яlich pers√ґnliche Einsch√§tzungen wider. Jede Zuh√ґrerin und jeder Zuh√ґrer handelt eigenverantwortlich und tr√§gt die volle Verantwortung f√Љr eigene Investitionsentscheidungen.Bitte beachte: Bitcoin ist volatil und Investitionen k√ґnnen zu Verlusten f√Љhren.Informiere dich umfassend und bilde dir eine eigene Meinung, bevor du finanzielle Entscheidungen triffst.Ein zentraler Grundsatz lautet: Study Bitcoin.Partner:рЯІ°Bitcoin21 вАУ stylische Bitcoin Kleidung:Mit dem Code FINANZB bekommst du 10 % Rabatt auf deine gesamte Bestellung. https://bitcoin21.shop/?ref=FINANZB рЯІ°Coinfinity вАУ Bitcoin B√ґrse :https://coinfinity.co/bitcoin-appCode: FINANZB - Damit sparst du 21 % deiner Geb√Љhren in den ersten 6 Monaten.рЯІ°21statues вАУ Bitcoin Lampen und Statuen:https://21statues.de?sca_ref=10285598.SH2VZ7SHVa8Code: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteWeitere Empfehlungen und Codes:рЯІ°BitBox вАУ Cold Wallet:https://shop.bitbox.swiss/?ref=tfjnborqCode: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteрЯІ°Seedor вАУ Backup-L√ґsung in Stahl:https://www.seedor.io/discount/FINANZB Code: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteрЯІ°21Bitcoin вАУ Bitcoin B√ґrse: https://21bitcoin.app.link/invite/?code=LEBENMITBITCOINCode: LEBENMITBITCOIN - Damit sparst du bis zu 21 % deiner Geb√Љhren.

Was sind die Risiken und Herausforderungen f√Љr Anleger in KI-Krypto-Projekten?

Anleger in KI-Krypto-Projekten m√Љssen sich mit Risiken wie Volatilit√§t, Marktrisiken, technologischen H√Љrden und regulatorischen Unsicherheiten auseinandersetzen.
Wie kann man in KI-Krypto-Coins investieren?

Anleger k√ґnnen in KI-Krypto-Coins investieren, indem sie auf empfohlenen Krypto-B√ґrsen wie Bitpanda, Coinbase und WEEX kaufen und ihre Krypto-Assets sicher aufbewahren.
Was sind die Zukunftsperspektiven f√Љr die Kombination von KI und Bitcoin?

Die Zukunftsperspektiven f√Љr die Kombination von KI und Bitcoin sehen vielversprechend aus, da technologische Entwicklungen und potenzielle Marktentwicklungen neue Chancen f√Љr Anleger und Nutzer er√ґffnen k√ґnnten.
]]>

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach вАУ Cloning El SalvadorвАЩs Bitcoin Beach: How India, Peru, & the Dominican Republic are Adopting Bitcoin | Plebs Together Strong, MOTIV Per√Ї, Bitcoindominicana
item.description:
Is legacy aid a fiat trap? See how unbanked communities use a Bitcoin standard and circular economy networks to achieve sustainable development. We recorded this episode right from the beach in El Zonte, El Salvador, following the conclusion of our global Bitcoin circular economy summit. Leaders from all over the world came into town to show how they are bypassing corporate charities and corrupt state infrastructure. It was incredibly humbling to sit down with three of these absolute warriors to hear how they are driving a true grassroots movement for monetary freedom on the absolute front lines of global hyperbitcoinization.

First, I catch up with Pedro (@btcdominicana) from Bitcoin Dominicana, who is proving that you do not need IMF approval or a legacy bank account to build a self-sustaining circular economy. He shares updates on his amazing work in Santo Domingo and the surrounding mountains, including the launch of the very first Bitcoin-only hotel in the Dominican Republic. We talk about how a cash society with a massive unbanked population is actually the perfect environment to ditch fiat entirely. Pedro explains why starting small with close community development beats trying to launch in a massive city all at once, and how digital payments are helping local agricultural communities protect their hard-earned wealth from state inflation.

Next up is Aaronman (@plebstogether) from Bitcoin Beach Goa and Plebs Together Strong, who is battling the massive wave of shitcoin noise and crypto affinity fraud slowing down adoption in India. India is historically a massive hub for sound money like gold, but the mainstream corporate media narrative has left the younger demographic completely blind to true financial education. We discuss how his team is tapping into this massive tech-savvy youth population to build local sovereign infrastructure, create remote freelance opportunities to earn Bitcoin online, and open up direct remittance corridors that bypass greedy middlemen to foster sustainable development back in local villages.

Finally, I sit down with Valentin Popescu (@MotivPeru) from Motiv Peru to look at how a pure Bitcoin standard completely obliterates the necessity of legacy international humanitarian aid. Valentin and his team are operating across fifteen different sites spanning the coast, the Andes, and the deep Amazon jungle, proving that opt-in money is the ultimate tool for genuine empowerment. Families are using sats every single day for English classes, entrepreneurship programs, and even to buy clean water from a community well funded entirely by the project. We also talk about their massive Copa Bitcoin surf competition in Huanchaco and how they connected local youth culture with global tourism.

This episode is all the proof you need that a peer-to-peer monetary standard is not a far-off dream, it has already been put into action by the places that need it most. If you want to support these communities and stay updated on the global monetary revolution, go ahead and hit that subscribe button, leave us a review, and share this episode with a fellow pleb. Let us know in the comments which of these projects you plan on visiting first, just make sure you pack your surfboard or brush up on your Merengue steps before you hop on the plane.


вАФBitcoin Beach Team



Learn more about the guests:
X(Aaronman): https://x.com/plebstogether¬†
X(Valentin Popescu): https://x.com/MotivPeru¬†
X(Pedro Vital): https://x.com/btcdominicana


Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach¬†
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv¬†
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach¬†
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com¬†


Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 Intro
00:53 Can you buy real estate and pay for hotels with Bitcoin?
02:14 How do unbanked countries use Bitcoin without traditional banks?
03:13 What happens when a cash and barter society adopts Bitcoin?
04:40 How to teach financial literacy and Bitcoin to illiterate communities?
07:18 Is Bitcoin fixing central banking and corporate financial corruption?
13:28 Why is crypto a scam while Bitcoin is a real asset?
15:52 How to bypass legacy banks and get paid in Bitcoin remotely?
22:58 What are the best real-world utility and humanitarian use cases for Bitcoin?
26:45 Can local sports tournaments drive organic cryptocurrency adoption?

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

item.title: Onramp Bitcoin Media вАУ The Dollar Reset Runs Through Bitcoin | Matt Dines
item.description:
The Last Trade: Matt Dines, CIO of Build Asset Management, joins to lay out the seismic monetary reshuffling underway in 2026, the unwind of the post-Bretton-Woods offshore-dollar system that ran the global economy from 1971 to 2022, why LIBOR's deprecation and the SOFR transition quietly moved the dollar's command center from London to New York, Scott Bessent's strategy to monetize the asset side of the Treasury balance sheet through the GENIUS Act stablecoin and a Bitcoin reserve targeting 1 million BTC, Tether's December 2023 alignment with the American Sovereignist movement, and the contrarian read on MicroStrategy as a "dollar strategy" rather than a Bitcoin strategy.


---


рЯФЄ Connect with Onramp: The leader in resilient, fault-tolerant Multi-Institution Custody for secure, enduring bitcoin ownership.


рЯСЙ Onramp Finance: https://onrampbitcoin.com/finance

рЯСЙ Sign up for Genesis: https://onrampbitcoin.com/finance#gen..

рЯУ© Schedule a consultation: https://onrampbitcoin.com/consult


The Last Trade: a weekly, bitcoin-native podcast covering the intersection of bitcoin, tech, & finance on a macro scale. Hosted by Jackson Mikalic, Michael Tanguma, & Brian Cubellis. Join us as we dive into what bitcoin means for how individuals & institutions save, invest, & propagate their purchasing power through time. It's not just another assetвА¶ in the digital age, it's The Last Trade that investors will ever need to make.


рЯОЩпЄП About This Episode

Matt Dines, CIO of Build Asset Management and author of "The Offshore Dollar Is Being Left Out to Dry" on mindprinthash.com, joins Jackson, Brian, and Michael to walk through the structural shift in the global dollar system that he argues is the single most important macro story of 2026. Matt traces the unwind of the post-Bretton-Woods offshore-dollar (eurodollar) system back to 2008, explains how the Federal Reserve's deprecation of LIBOR in favor of SOFR moved the dollar's command center from London to New York, and frames the 2024 election as a fork in the road between Biden's CBDC path (EO 14067) and the Trump / Sovereignist asset-backed dollar path. He details the playbook unfolding under Scott Bessent and Treasury: the GENIUS Act stablecoin as the bridge, a Bitcoin reserve targeting 1 million BTC (per Congressman Begich's American Reserve Modernization Act, the successor to Senator Lummis' Bitcoin Act), and gold becoming the biggest liquidity pool while the offshore dollar drains. Matt argues that Bitcoin is NOT yet seen as a risk-off asset by the market, but the long-term setup points there. He reframes MicroStrategy as a "dollar strategy" rather than a Bitcoin strategy: borrowing US onshore equity-market liquidity at 11-13% to go long Bitcoin priced primarily in the OLD offshore-dollar (Tether) standard, with major implications for stretch and the broader DAT trade. Plus historical parallels (Civil War greenbacks transitioning to the gold-pegged dollar of 1875; silver certificates phasing out for Fed notes from 1957), Tether's December 2023 alignment with the American Sovereignist movement, the Schwab UTXO Bitcoin custody rollout, and how to position for the most violent middle innings of this dollar transition.


рЯІ† Chapters

00:00 - Introduction and Context Setting

01:52 - Monetary Reshuffling and Global Dynamics

12:50 - The Shift from Liability to Asset-Based Dollar

20:51 - Implications for Investors and Capital Allocation

26:31 - The Future of Bitcoin in the New Monetary Order

35:12 - The Future of Currency: Asset-Backed Dollars

42:32 - Tether's Strategic Shift and Geopolitical Implications

46:07 - Fragmentation in the Bitcoin Space

52:30 - Corporate Strategies and Market Dynamics

61:29 - The Integration of Bitcoin into Traditional Finance


рЯТ° Subscribe & Stay Ahead


Get Onramp's weekly Research & Analysis:

High-signal insights in bitcoin, macro, and custody.

рЯУ© https://onrampbitcoin.com/research


Subscribe to Onramp Media for more:

рЯОІ The Last Trade | Final Settlement | Scarce Assets

]]>

item.description:

item.title: Der Bitcoin Kompass: Wegweiser im Kaninchenbau вАУ Folge 5: Der Bitcoin-Preis вАУ Zwischen Angebot, Nachfrage und Geldpolitik
item.description:
Was bestimmt eigentlich den Bitcoin-Preis? In Folge 5 vom Bitcoin-Kompass sprechen wir √Љeber eines der meistdiskutierten Themen im Bitcoin-Space: den Preis. Dabei geht es nicht um Prognosen oder Kaufempfehlungen, sondern um ein grundlegendes Verst√§ndnis daf√Љer, wie der Bitcoin-Preis entsteht und welche Kraefte ihn beeinflussen.


Wir erkl√§ren, wie Angebot und Nachfrage auf Bitcoin-B√ґrsen funktionieren, warum das Handelsvolumen oft wichtiger ist als der Preis selbst und welche Rolle die Marktkapitalisierung spielt. Ausserdem beleuchten wir die grossen Einflussfaktoren: das Bitcoin-Halving und den Vier-Jahres-Zyklus, die Geldpolitik der US-Notenbank (Fed), Inflation und die wachsenden Staatsschulden der USA. Im Vergleich zwischen Bitcoin und Gold zeigen sie, warum Bitcoin technologisch ueberlegen sein k√ґnnte - und warum der Preis letztlich ein Spiegel des wachsenden Vertrauens in diese neue Technologie ist.


Mehr Infos, interaktive Grafiken zur Marktkapitalisierung und Kontaktmoeglichkeiten findet ihr auf:


Webseite: https://derbitcoinkompass.ch

E-Mail: kontakt@derbitcoinkompass.ch

Telegram: https://t.me/btc_kaninchenbau


Feedback und Fragen gerne per E-Mail, ueber Telegram oder ueber unsere Webseite.



(00:00:00) Begruessung & Einfuehrung ins Thema Preis

(00:01:31) Volatilitaet und der aktuelle Bitcoin-Preis

(00:02:33) Kaufkraft, Inflation und warum Menschen investieren

(00:05:20) Marktkapitalisierung: Bitcoin vs. Gold vs. Immobilien vs. Aktien

(00:08:05) Wie entsteht der Bitcoin-Preis? Angebot & Nachfrage erklaert

(00:11:04) Warum das Handelsvolumen entscheidend ist

(00:12:43) Die grossen Einflussfaktoren auf den Bitcoin-Preis

(00:13:26) In was messen wir den Preis? Euro, Dollar oder Aepfel?

(00:17:03) Warum Geld kein stabiler Massstab ist

(00:18:10) Bitcoins festes Angebot: Maximal 21 Millionen

(00:20:02) Das Halving und der Vier-Jahres-Zyklus

(00:24:22) Die Fed, Zinspolitik und US-Staatsschulden

(00:31:27) Was bedeutet das alles fuer den Bitcoin-Preis?

(00:33:37) Bitcoin vs. Gold: Vorteile und Unterschiede

(00:40:30) Preisprognose: Bitcoin auf 1 Million Dollar?

(00:41:54) Zusammenfassung & Verabschiedung

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll вАУ From PayPal to Stellar: The Journey of Jose Fernandez da Ponte
item.description:
Stablecoins are moving beyond crypto markets and becoming part of the financial systemвАЩs core infrastructure. In this episode of BFRRвАЩs Digital Money Interview Series, co-host Jonas Gross and guest host Jonathan Knoll speak with Jos√© Fern√°ndez da Ponte, President and Chief Growth Officer at the Stellar Development Foundation and former Head of Blockchain and Digital Currencies at PayPal.

Drawing on two decades in payments, banking and fintech, Jos√© explains why blockchain technology could reshape financial rails that still rely on decades-old systems. He describes blockchains as вАЬLinux for paymentsвАЭ: open-source, permissionless infrastructure on which institutions, developers and fintech companies can build new products step by step.

The conversation explores why stablecoins are gaining momentum now, from regulatory clarity and institutional confidence to emerging use cases in cross-border payments, treasury, payroll and commerce. Jos√© also discusses tokenized real-world assets and the shift in institutional conversations: the question is no longer whether assets such as money market funds can be tokenized, but how they can be distributed, used as collateral and integrated into markets.

A major focus is StellarвАЩs role in institutional finance, including the announcement that DTCC plans to make tokenized assets available on Stellar. Jos√© explains what institutions look for in a blockchain: speed, liquidity, uptime, compliance tooling, risk controls and openness.

The discussion then turns to agentic commerce. As AI agents begin to transact at machine speed, payment systems may need to support micropayments, streaming payments and higher transaction volumes. Finally, Jos√© outlines why privacy will be essential for on-chain payments and how configurable privacy, confidential tokens and selective disclosure could reconcile transparency with compliance.

A conversation about rebuilding financial infrastructure from first principles вАФ and why the future of money may depend on open, institutional-grade networks.

Jose Fernandez da Ponte LinkedIn

DTCC & Stellar Announcement

Stellar Q1 2026 Report

Stellar Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll Website

Stablecoins are moving beyond crypto markets and becoming part of the financial systemвАЩs core infrastructure. In this episode of BFRRвАЩs Digital Money Interview Series, co-host Jonas Gross and guest host Jonathan Knoll speak with Jos√© Fern√°ndez da Ponte, President and Chief Growth Officer at the Stellar Development Foundation and former Head of Blockchain and Digital Currencies at PayPal.

Drawing on two decades in payments, banking and fintech, Jos√© explains why blockchain technology could reshape financial rails that still rely on decades-old systems. He describes blockchains as вАЬLinux for paymentsвАЭ: open-source, permissionless infrastructure on which institutions, developers and fintech companies can build new products step by step.

The conversation explores why stablecoins are gaining momentum now, from regulatory clarity and institutional confidence to emerging use cases in cross-border payments, treasury, payroll and commerce. Jos√© also discusses tokenized real-world assets and the shift in institutional conversations: the question is no longer whether assets such as money market funds can be tokenized, but how they can be distributed, used as collateral and integrated into markets.

A major focus is StellarвАЩs role in institutional finance, including the announcement that DTCC plans to make tokenized assets available on Stellar. Jos√© explains what institutions look for in a blockchain: speed, liquidity, uptime, compliance tooling, risk controls and openness.

The discussion then turns to agentic commerce. As AI agents begin to transact at machine speed, payment systems may need to support micropayments, streaming payments and higher transaction volumes. Finally, Jos√© outlines why privacy will be essential for on-chain payments and how configurable privacy, confidential tokens and selective disclosure could reconcile transparency with compliance.

A conversation about rebuilding financial infrastructure from first principles вАФ and why the future of money may depend on open, institutional-grade networks.

Jose Fernandez da Ponte LinkedIn

DTCC & Stellar Announcement

Stellar Q1 2026 Report

Stellar Website

item.title: Swan Signal Live - A Bitcoin Show вАУ Is the Bottom In? Bitcoin's Record ETF Streak and the AI Money Magnet
item.description:
• Bitcoin is mired in a record 13-day ETF outflow streak and wicked down near 59K before recovering to the low 60s
  • Multiple on-chain bottom signals are flashing: coins held at a loss exceeding coins in profit, a touch of the 200-week moving average, and long-term holder supply near an all-time high at 16.3 million coins
  • Each bear market is getting milder, with roughly 50% of addresses still in profit at this cycle's low versus about 35% back in 2015
  • Brady and John argue the AI IPO supercycle (OpenAI, Anthropic, SpaceX) is vacuuming up risk capital and is the largest competing claim Bitcoin has faced to date
  • Pierre Rochard, Nik Bhatia, and Mark Moss all frame the drawdown as repricing and AI competition rather than broken fundamentals
  • JPMorgan, Bank of America, and Citi announced a shared tokenized deposit network through The Clearing House, a closed bank ledger that has nothing to do with Bitcoin
  • Better and Coinbase issued a Fannie Mae-backed mortgage letting a Michigan couple pledge Bitcoin as collateral without selling, avoiding capital gains while keeping upside
  • Fed cut odds stay murky after a strong jobs print, with Kevin Hassett arguing growth doesn't require hikes and Trump publicly pushing for cuts
  • The hosts float a speculative, unverified theory that DOJ-seized Bitcoin from operations in Cambodia, Venezuela, and Iran may be quietly hitting the market
  • Brady and John make the case that Bitcoin thrives in an AI future as deflationary money for an emerging autonomous machine economy

item.title: Once Bitten! A Bitcoin Podcast. вАУ Mining Wild Sats With Sazmining - Kent Halliburton - #613
item.description:
**Mine Bitcoin.

Own Your Rigs.

Ditch the Exchanges**

$ BTC 63,247

Block Height 952,828

Today's guest is Kent Halliburton from Sazmining who joins me to discuss his journey from cranberry farming and solar energy to Bitcoin, the company's "mining as a service" model, and the broader implications of AI/HPC on Bitcoin mining decentralisation.

Key Topics:

  • Kent Halliburton's personal and professional journey from cranberry farming to the solar energy industry.
  • The transition from a traditional fiat career to discovering and embracing Bitcoin.
  • Sazmining's "mining as a service" model, emphasising hardware ownership and aligned incentives.
  • The impact of AI/HPC (High-Performance Computing) on public Bitcoin mining companies and hash rate dynamics.
  • Debate around energy subsidies and the role of Bitcoin mining in energy markets.
  • The concept of "Wild Sats" and the value of decentralised Bitcoin acquisition.
  • The importance of low time preference and self-sovereignty learned through unique life experiences.
  • Discussion on Bitcoin mining ROI and the emerging hash power rental market.

Check out my book вАШChoose LifeвАЩ - https://bitcoinbook.shop/search?q=prince

item.title: Bitcoin & Beyond | Dein Geld neu denken вАУ St√Љrzt der Bitcoin jetzt auf 49.000 Dollar ab?
item.description:
Der Bitcoin hat innerhalb von nur neun Monaten rund die H√§lfte seines Werts verloren. Im Oktober 2025 sah der Kryptomarkt noch so aus, als w√Љrde er von einem Rekord zum n√§chsten laufen вАУ bis geopolitische Spannungen die Stimmung kippen lie√Яen und die Kurse abst√Љrzten. Seitdem geht es weiter bergab: Mal sorgt die Angst vor steigenden Zinsen f√Љr Druck, mal reicht es schon, wenn ein prominenter Bitcoin-Fan ein paar Mini-Anteile abst√ґ√Яt вАУ und pl√ґtzlich wird daraus Panik. Viele Anleger hatten auf einen Dauerboom gehofft. Bitcoin-ETFs sollten zus√§tzliches Geld von Profiinvestoren anziehen. Und mit Donald Trump als US-Pr√§sident schien der Branche sogar politischer R√Љckenwind sicher. Beides hat den Markt zwar kurz angeschoben вАУ getragen hat es die Rally aber nicht. Jetzt steckt Bitcoin in einer Art Sinnkrise. In dieser Folge sprechen Lukas und Philipp dar√Љber,

  • warum der Bitcoin zun√§chst so stark gestiegen ist,
  • wieso er sich innerhalb weniger Monate halbiert hat
  • und warum es f√Љr den Bitcoin sogar noch weiter abw√§rts gehen k√ґnnte.

Ihr wollt tiefer in die Bitcoin-Chartanalyse eintauchen? Dann lest unseren aktuellen Beitrag dazu: https://www.wiwo.de/100230242.html

Disclaimer: Dieser Podcast ist keine Anlageberatung, sondern dient lediglich der Information und Unterhaltung. Die Hosts oder der Verlag √Љbernehmen keine Haftung f√Љr Anlageentscheidungen, die ihr aufgrund der im Podcast geh√ґrten Informationen trefft.

Wenn ihr Fragen, Anregungen oder Feedback habt, schreibt uns gerne an bb@wiwo.de

Das exklusive Abo-Angebot f√Љr alle H√ґrerinnen und H√ґrer von WiWo Bitcoin & Beyond: https://www.wiwo.de/starten

Helft uns, unsere Podcasts weiter zu verbessern. Eure Meinung ist uns wichtig: www.wiwo.de/zufriedenheit

Weitere Informationen zu Werbeeinblendungen

]]>

item.description:
16th lecture of Principles of Economics explores the economics of violence in both its private and governmental forms, the non-aggression principle as the foundation of peaceful cooperation, how government coercion differs from market exchange, and the rationales offered to justify state violence.

item.title: Blockspace: AI & Bitcoin вАУ SpaceXвАЩs $250B IPO Raise, KEELвАЩs $458M Convertible Note, Hut 8вАЩs $4.25 Senior Note, OpenAIвАЩs 10 GW Datacenter
item.description:
Welcome back to The Blockspace Podcast! Reuters has reported that SpaceXвАЩs IPO round could come in at $250 billion, a 3x oversubscription from the companyвАЩs planned $75 billion. Plus, Cormint CEO Jamie McAvity joins us to give an optimistic outlook on bitcoin mining with hashrate stagnant вАУ even as hashprice flirts with all-time lows. For other news, we cover KeelвАЩs $458 million convertible note; Hut 8вАЩs $4.25 billion senior secured note for its Beacon Point data center, the second investment-grade bond for project-level financing for the burgeoning AI firm; Crusoe hitting pause on a proposed 10 GW data center in Wyoming; and OpenAIвАЩs plans for its own 10 GW, $500 billion project in Ohio.

Check out our latest report, вАЬWhatвАЩs a Megawatt Worth?вАЭ where we quantify the trillion dollar opportunity for bitcoin miners venturing into the AI sector.¬†

Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates for all of our shows and content.

рЯСЙCleanSpark (Nasdaq: CLSK), a market-leading data center developer with a proven track record of success.

рЯСЙLuxor, Blockspace's preferred mining pool. Start hashing today with Luxor!

рЯСЙLygos Finance, Borrow against your Bitcoin, without compromising on custody.

]]>

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends вАУ #59 CARF: Ausl√§ndische Krypto-Plattformen melden deine Daten - mit Thomas Linder
item.description:
**Diese Episode wird von PostFinance pr√§sentiert***

Dein Krypto-Update: Der monatliche Krypto-Newsletter von PostFinance ordnet die wichtigsten Entwicklungen rund um Bitcoin, Ethereum und Co. kompakt ein. рЯСЙ Jetzt abonnieren: https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/moeglichkeiten/krypto/newsletter-abonnieren.html#/category?groupId=newsletter_krypto

********************************************************

Ab 2027 melden ausl√§ndische Krypto-Plattformen deine Daten automatisch an die Schweizer Steuerbeh√ґrde . Rino spricht mit Steuerspezialisten Thomas Linder von MME dar√Љber, was CARF konkret heisst, wer betroffen ist und warum jetzt der Moment zum Handeln ist.

Das Wichtigste in dieser Folge:

  • CARF l√§uft wie der AIA f√Љrs Bankkonto, einfach f√Љr Krypto. Nicht du meldest, sondern der Dienstleister.
  • Wer nie deklariert hat, sollte jetzt √Љber die straflose Selbstanzeige nachdenken. Danach drohen Bussen bis zum F√Љnffachen.
  • Self-Custody und DeFi bleiben vorerst aussen vor, ^und die USA f√§hrt ihr eigenes System.
  • Die gr√ґssere Frage ist die Privatsph√§re, ganz ohne breite Debatte durchgewunken.

Gast: Thomas Linder, Tax Partner bei MME, leitet dort das DLT-Team und ist seit zehn Jahren im Schweizer Krypto-Steuerrecht zu Hause.


Abonniere unseren Newsletter f√Љr Bitcoin-Insights, praktische Tipps und viel Wissen aus dem House of Satoshi: https://house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter

]]>
item.itunes:summary:
**Diese Episode wird von PostFinance pr√§sentiert***

Dein Krypto-Update: Der monatliche Krypto-Newsletter von PostFinance ordnet die wichtigsten Entwicklungen rund um Bitcoin, Ethereum und Co. kompakt ein. рЯСЙ Jetzt abonnieren: https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/moeglichkeiten/krypto/newsletter-abonnieren.html#/category?groupId=newsletter_krypto

********************************************************

Ab 2027 melden ausl√§ndische Krypto-Plattformen deine Daten automatisch an die Schweizer Steuerbeh√ґrde . Rino spricht mit Steuerspezialisten Thomas Linder von MME dar√Љber, was CARF konkret heisst, wer betroffen ist und warum jetzt der Moment zum Handeln ist.

Das Wichtigste in dieser Folge:

  • CARF l√§uft wie der AIA f√Љrs Bankkonto, einfach f√Љr Krypto. Nicht du meldest, sondern der Dienstleister.
  • Wer nie deklariert hat, sollte jetzt √Љber die straflose Selbstanzeige nachdenken. Danach drohen Bussen bis zum F√Љnffachen.
  • Self-Custody und DeFi bleiben vorerst aussen vor, ^und die USA f√§hrt ihr eigenes System.
  • Die gr√ґssere Frage ist die Privatsph√§re, ganz ohne breite Debatte durchgewunken.

Gast: Thomas Linder, Tax Partner bei MME, leitet dort das DLT-Team und ist seit zehn Jahren im Schweizer Krypto-Steuerrecht zu Hause.


Abonniere unseren Newsletter f√Љr Bitcoin-Insights, praktische Tipps und viel Wissen aus dem House of Satoshi: https://house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show вАУ #183 - Chris Summerfield - AI, Memory & the Race to Superintelligence
item.description:
I talk to Chris Summerfield about what artificial intelligence reveals about the human mind, and what the brain still does better than todayвАЩs AI systems.


We discuss why LLMs feel human, how models are trained to be helpful and agreeable, why memory and continual learning remain major unsolved problems in AI, and how sleep helps humans consolidate knowledge. They also explore agentic AI systems, rogue behaviour, reward hacking, misalignment, superintelligence, education, jobs, and whether AI will make humans more capable or less in control.


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

00:15:34 - From DeepMind to Modern AI

00:24:16 - One of My AIs Went Rogue

item.title: M√Љnzweg - der Bitcoin-Podcast вАУ M√Љnzgasse #71 Auf der Suche nach Magic Internet Money (mit Jan-Paul, Lightrider & Lawrence)
item.description:
Manu hat in letzter Zeit viel erlebt, viel beobachtet вАУ und noch mehr Fragen im Kopf. Taugt Bitcoin wirklich als Zahlungsmittel im Alltag? Nicht als Theorie, nicht als Wunschdenken, sondern da drau√Яen, wo echte Menschen echtes Geld ausgeben?

F√Љr die letzte M√Љnzgasse vor der Sommerpause hat er sich deshalb drei G√§ste eingeladen, die diese Frage nicht aus dem Lehrbuch beantworten вАУ sondern aus dem Maschinenraum. Jan-Paul von Bitrefill, Lightrider von Nadanada und Lawrence von Shopinbit sitzen t√§glich mitten drin. Sie sehen die Zahlen, sie sp√Љren die Trends, und sie reden heute ungewohnt offen dar√Љber, was wirklich passiert, welches Geld ihre Kunden bevorzugen.

Diese Folge ist kein Hype, kein Bashing вАУ sie ist ein ehrlicher Blick auf den Stand der Dinge. Mit drei Unternehmen, die f√Љr sich selbst sprechen k√ґnnen, weil sie den Beweis tagt√§glich antreten m√Љssen.

Perfekt f√Љr alle, die weniger reden und mehr wissen wollen.

Einen sch√ґnen Sommer вАУ und bis nach der Pause.

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value вАУ Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†BitVaultвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.title: Bitcoin And | Bitcoin & Economic News вАУ Kalshi Intelligence Agency | Bitcoin News
item.description:
Bitcoin news and economic news update. Today I cover Ross Ulbricht/DoJ threat pardon politics, Fold HoldingsвАЩ $45 million bitcoin move, Botanix shutting down its Bitcoin scaling platform, bitcoin price action as inflation hits a three-year high, SpaceX IPO demand, Strategy share-sale debate, Kalshi safeguards, and a new CFTC proposal for prediction markets. This episode touches on bitcoin regulation, financial news, bitcoin price, and the broader economics of bitcoin. 


Topics for today: 
  •  Ross Ulbricht commutation pressure and DOJ politics 
  •  Fold HoldingsвАЩ $45 million bitcoin move 
  •  Botanix shutdown and withdrawal deadline 
  •  Bitcoin price rises as inflation heats up 
  •  SpaceX IPO demand squeezes crypto and tech 
  •  Strategy share sale dilution debate 
  •  Kalshi adds safeguards after insider trading concerns 
  •  CFTC rule proposal targets prediction markets 

Circle P:

 
https://www.takemysats.com/kidwarps-vanilla-shop
nostr: https://ditto.pub/npub1yfp4s82l246g8fzfmsrwcw9n3ap0x2pjehg9en5hfj8cyachv2kswh32lg
Use code bitcoin andвА¶ for 10% off!

KidwarpвАЩs Vanilla Shop is bringing quality homemade BitPaste from our kitchen to yours.
We source premium quality organic Madagascar vanilla beans and vanilla beans from different countries from all over the world to show off the different flavors of vanilla beans.
We use old time traditional vanilla extraction processes and not modern quick brew methods.
No corners are cut in our small batch production.
Vanilla beans chopped by hand and left to macerate for a minimum of two months in choice spirts before we blend them to perfection to make premium quality Bitpaste!
Use Bitpaste as a 1:1 replacement for vanilla extract in any recipe, try some in your coffee or tea, use it in your favorite cookie or ice cream recipe or mix it up and try it in something savory.

CrowdHealth Episode -> https://fountain.fm/episode/9pyNrOEL1P1c7X4WkGId

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast вАУ "The Fiat System Has Terminal Cancer" - Digital Credit is the Answer | BMP w/ Matt Cole Ep 12
item.description:
Could digital credit actually be making Bitcoin's bear market milder? In this episode, Strive CEO Matt Cole tells Brandon Green that new, non-Bitcoiner capital flowing into instruments like SATA and STRC is providing real "dip support" for Bitcoin. He walks through the three-to-five-year institutional adoption curve, why ETFs accelerate in year three, and how 2027вАУ2029 could set up an institution-driven bull market.

Use code BM10 to get 10% off Bitcoin 2027 Conference in Nashville: https://2027.b.tc

рЯФґ Host: Brandon Green - BTC Inc CEOрЯФґ Matt Cole - Strive

Chapters:

01:26 вАФ The "mild" bear market read

08:47 вАФ Double-digit Bitcoin-backed yields

16:25 вАФ SATA vs. common equity: the 13% math explained

23:25 вАФ Does digital credit make the bear market milder?

31:32 вАФ Why institutions wait for the year-three track record

38:51 вАФ Fed chair Warsh and the dollar's "terminal" diagnosis

44:26 вАФ Self-custody, cold storage, and Bitcoin as insurance

51:55 вАФ Hyperbitcoinization and Strive's endgame

57:02 вАФ Growing the pie, Michael Saylor, and final thoughts

#Bitcoin #BitcoinMagazine #MattCole #Strive #DigitalCredit #BitcoinTreasury #STRC #ASST #MichaelSaylor #Strategy #BitcoinYield #PerpetualPreferred #BitcoinBearMarket #BitcoinPrice #BitcoinETF #FixTheMoneyFixTheWorld #SoundMoney #FiatDebtCrisis #SelfCustody #ColdStorage #Hyperbitcoinization #BitcoinStandard #BitcoinNews #Macro #BitcoinPodcast

item.title: The Breakdown вАУ BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF Is $13 Billion Underwater
item.description:
BlackRock's IBIT is sitting about $13 billion underwater on its Bitcoin holdings. Every ETH ETF is in the red. David walks through which funds bought the top, which took profit, and what happens to crypto if ETF holders finally crack. Plus: a preview of DAS Asia and DAS London, and the SpaceX pre-IPO trade on Hyperliquid.

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show вАУ Why BIP-110 Will Win with Bitcoin Mechanic | Bitcoin Infinity Show #206
item.description:
Bitcoin Mechanic joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about BIP-110, the minority soft fork now activating on hard mode, and why he believes node runners rather than miners ultimately control the network. Drawing on his front-row view of the 2017 block size wars, he breaks down the game theory that pushes miners toward enforcing new consensus rules, the UTXO bloat and OP_RETURN abuse that motivated the fork, and how Ocean, Datum, and hash rate renting are quietly redecentralizing Bitcoin mining. The conversation closes on a reframing of censorship resistance and self-custody, arguing that keeping Bitcoin usable as money is itself the point of resisting chain bloat.

Connect with Mechanic:

https://x.com/GrassFedBitcoin

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/BtcInfinityShow

https://twitter.com/knutsvanholm

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

Thanks to our sponsors - check out their websites for info:

The Bitcoin Infinity Show is a Bitcoin podcast hosted by Knut Svanholm and produced by Luke de Wolf.

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Bitcoin Kidnappings, AI Slop, Quantum FUD, and Memetic Warfare | coinjoined Chris
item.description:
In this episode of THE Bitcoin Podcast, Walker sits down with coinjoined Chris for a wide-ranging conversation covering Bitcoin security, privacy, memes, AI propaganda, self-custody, and the future of freedom tech. They discuss the rise in violent вАЬ$5 wrench attacksвАЭ against Bitcoiners, operational security best practices, and why privacy tools and self-custody matter more than ever in an increasingly surveilled world.

They also dive deep into Bitcoin scaling debates, covenant proposals, quantum computing fears, and whether Bitcoin should continue evolving or ossify over time. Along the way, they explore AI-generated media, the changing culture of Bitcoin, the rise of institutional вАЬSuitcoiners,вАЭ and why memes remain one of the most powerful forms of modern propaganda.

The conversation closes with reflections on sovereignty, CBDCs, the future of money, and a philosophical speed round on plebs, voting, podcasts, and the fall of Rome.

In this episode of THE Bitcoin Podcast, Walker sits down with coinjoined Chris for a wide-ranging conversation covering Bitcoin security, privacy, memes, AI propaganda, self-custody, and the future of freedom tech. They discuss the rise in violent вАЬ$5 wrench attacksвАЭ against Bitcoiners, operational security best practices, and why privacy tools and self-custody matter more than ever in an increasingly surveilled world.

They also dive deep into Bitcoin scaling debates, covenant proposals, quantum computing fears, and whether Bitcoin should continue evolving or ossify over time. Along the way, they explore AI-generated media, the changing culture of Bitcoin, the rise of institutional вАЬSuitcoiners,вАЭ and why memes remain one of the most powerful forms of modern propaganda.

The conversation closes with reflections on sovereignty, CBDCs, the future of money, and a philosophical speed round on plebs, voting, podcasts, and the fall of Rome.

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO вАУ 18) ... Deflation f√Љr alle
item.description:
Warum schlagen √Цkonomen und Zentralbanken sofort Alarm, wenn sie das Wort вАЮDeflationвАЬ h√ґren? Sie warnen vor Wirtschaftskrisen, hoher Arbeitslosigkeit und dem Zusammenbruch der M√§rkte. Und in unserem aktuellen Finanzsystem haben sie damit sogar recht вАУ allerdings tun sie damit dem Begriff der Deflation unrecht.

In dieser Folge von вАЮbitcoin ist...вАЬ r√§umen wir mit einem der gr√ґ√Яten Mythen der modernen Wirtschaftswissenschaften auf und lernen den Begriff der Deflation neu. Denn es gibt zwei Arten von Deflation: Eine, die ein krankes System kollabieren l√§sst, und eine, die der absolute Normalzustand der menschlichen Zivilisation sein sollte.

  • Der "Fehler" im System: Warum unser schuldenbasiertes Geldsystem Angst vor sinkenden Preisen hat und warum Kredite niemals вАЮteurerвАЬ werden d√Љrfen.

  • Die gute Deflation: Wie der technologische Fortschritt (vom Rad bis zum Internet) unser Leben nat√Љrlicherweise immer effizienter und g√Љnstiger machen m√Љsste.

  • Das 2%-Mantra: Warum Zentralbanken die Geldmenge k√Љnstlich ausweiten, um den Produktivit√§tsgewinn deiner Lebenszeit unbemerkt abzusch√ґpfen.

  • Bitcoin als L√ґsung: Wie eine absolut begrenzte Geldmenge von 21 Millionen Einheiten daf√Љr sorgt, dass der menschliche Fortschritt endlich wieder direkt in deinem Geldbeutel landet.

вАЮDie Zentralbanken bek√§mpfen die schlechte Deflation, indem sie permanent Geld drucken. Doch damit zerst√ґren sie gleichzeitig die gute Deflation вАУ sie fressen den technologischen Fortschritt einfach auf und verw√§ssern unsere Kaufkraft schleichend.вАЬ

  • Abonniere den Podcast auf Spotify, Apple Podcasts oder deiner Lieblings-Plattform, um keine Folge der Microlearning-Reihe zu verpassen.

  • Mehr bitcoin-Inhalte: Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kan√§len: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist

  • Der n√§chste Schritt f√Љr Einsteiger: Lerne, wie du deine Kaufkraft unkompliziert sch√Љtzt. Hol dir meine kostenlose und sichere Kaufanleitung direkt in dein Postfach: https://tinyurl.com/45rpsjuc

Gef√§llt dir der Podcast? Dann hinterlasse mir gerne eine 5-Sterne-Bewertung auf Spotify oder Apple Podcasts und teile diese Folge mit Freunden und Familie, die Wirtschaft endlich verstehen wollen!


]]>

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell вАУ Amy Oldenburg: Morgan Stanley Insider on Why Bitcoin's Stuck, How Much to Own, and What's Next
item.description:
Morgan Stanley manages trillions вАФ and it's now putting Bitcoin in front of clients.

Amy Oldenburg runs the firm's digital asset strategy, and she joins Natalie Brunell to break down what Wall Street actually sees in Bitcoin, why the price has been stuck, and what could finally move it. She also explains how much Bitcoin Morgan Stanley tells clients to own, why most financial advisors still aren't on board, and her honest take on where the price goes over the next 5 years.

Topics:

  • Why a 26-year Wall Street veteran embraced Bitcoin
  • How much Bitcoin Morgan Stanley recommends owning
  • Why Bitcoin is stuck even as the banks pile in
  • What could spark the next big move
  • Her real 5-year and 10-year Bitcoin outlook
  • Why "all crypto is the same" is a costly mistake

Amy Oldenburg is Head of Digital Asset Strategy at Morgan Stanley. Connect with her on LinkedIn.

----

---

----

With Ledn, you get custody loans, no credit checks, no monthly payments, and more. Get .25% off your first loan, learn more at https://www.Ledn.io/natalie

Abundant Mines is a fully-managed Bitcoin mining in the U.S. You own the miners. You keep 100% of the Bitcoin. Voted #1 mining company by peers. Get 1 month of free hosting: AbundantMines.com/Natalie

----

Natalie's Bitcoin Product Partners:

  • Check out my favorite lightning wallet and trivia app Speed Wallet. If you're a business, let Speed help you accept BTC like they did for Steak 'n Shake! Visit http://speed.app/natalie/ and use code COINSTORIES10 for 5,000 free sats
  • Block's Bitkey Cold Storage Wallet was named to TIME's prestigious Best Inventions of 2024 in the category of Privacy & Security. Get 10% off using code STORIES at https://bitkey.world
  • Master your Bitcoin self-custody with 1-on-1 help and gain peace of mind with the help of The Bitcoin Way: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/natalie
  • With BitcoinIRA, you can invest in bitcoin 24/7 inside a tax-advantaged IRA. Choose a Traditional IRA to defer taxes, or a Roth IRA for tax-free withdrawals later. Take control of your future with BitcoinIRA: https://www.bitcoinira.com/natalie

Natalie's Upcoming Events:

  • Join us for the biggest Bitcoin conference in Europe at BTC Prague this June 10-13 with a keynote from Michael Saylor, Code HODL for discounted passes: https://btcprague.com/

item.title: Bitcoin Fortress вАУ BF219 - Top Bitcoin News - 6/7/26
item.description:
Date: June 7, 2026
Block Height: 952742
Moscow Time: 1608

¬†

In this episode:

In Episode 219 of The Bitcoin Fortress Podcast, we break down one of the most volatile weeks Bitcoin has seen in months. We examine the sharp price correction, record ETF outflows, rising Treasury yields, and what tightening liquidity conditions may mean for Bitcoin going forward. We discuss Strategy's first Bitcoin sale since 2022, the growing risks and opportunities surrounding Bitcoin treasury companies, corporate accumulation from firms like Strive, the latest developments in the CLARITY Act and stablecoin legislation, mining and network fundamentals, and the major themes emerging from Bitcoin 2026 and the broader Bitcoin podcast universe. We also feature Week 3 of the "A Bitcoin Way of Life" series and discuss why conviction matters most when markets test it.

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Interviews вАУ Abiodun, Mysten Labs CPO вАФ The Paper That Killed Single-CPU Consensus
item.description: <![CDATA[Adeniyi Abiodun has been in crypto since 2012, built trading and risk systems at investment banks, and led R&D on Facebook's Project Libra at Meta before co-founding Mysten Labs. So when he says every other L1 has a "skill issue" baked in at architecture time, it's worth listening.David Sencil sits down with Adeniyi at Consensus 2026 to walk through how Sui solved horizontal-scale consensus, why a famous L1 founder said it was impossible, and what comes next вАФ native stablecoins, private payments by default, Walrus storage, and the agentic payment rails Stripe is pricing at a billion TPS.We cover:- Why every other L1 is capped by a single CPU and Moore's Law- The Project Libra story вАФ "way too early" and what survived into Sui- 300ms finality vs Solana's 12 seconds- SuiUSD: $63M in a month and a half, free stablecoin transfers- Protocol-level private stablecoin transactions launching this year- Walrus storage outgrowing Arweave in a year- Why "AI doesn't care about your tribe"Filmed at Consensus 2026.Host: David SencilрЯОІ Listen now and follow Bitcoin.com News on Spotify for more conversations with the builders, founders, and innovators shaping the future of crypto, AI, and decentralized technology.]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal вАУ 2364: $10M Bitcoin Reserve - There Are No Coins Left To Buy
item.description:
The United States already has a proposal to acquire 1,000,000 Bitcoin. What happens if America begins buying at that scale? China notices. Russia notices. Every major nation notices. Suddenly the question isn't whether Bitcoin succeeds - it's how much supply remains.

In Episode 2364, we examine the Bitcoin supply shock, shrinking exchange balances, the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve proposal, nation-state game theory, and the math behind a potential $10 million Bitcoin. As more coins move into long-term storage and stronger hands, the battle may no longer be about finding buyers. It may be about finding sellers.

рЯУЇ Prefer video? Watch daily Bitcoin breakdowns: http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS вАУ 60.000-Dollar-Marke gebrochen вАУ Panik oder Kaufgelegenheit?
item.description:
Der Bitcoin konnte die Unterst√Љtzung bei 60.000 Dollar nicht halten. Unabh√§ngig davon wie stark die Nerven beim Investieren in Bitcoin und Altcoins sein m√Љssen вАУ die vergangene Woche hat viele Anleger Blut und Wasser schwitzen lassen. Warum sich dadurch die Zeichen auf einen Ausbruch nach oben mehren, wie erschreckend der Blick hinter die vermeintlich guten US-Arbeitsmarktdaten ist und was Anleger diese Woche abseits des Mega-IPOs von SpaceX erwartet, verr√§t Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG) in einer neuen Folge von вАЮBITCOIN & ALTCOINSвАЬ.

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht f√Љr etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

Das Gespr√§ch wurde am 09.06.2026 an der Frankfurter B√ґrse aufgezeichnet.

T√§gliche Informationen gef√§llig? Dann ab zu вАЮKrypto-InsightsвАЬ вАУ dem Telegram-Kanal von Oliver Michel und Johanna Kr√§mer. Weitere Infos unter www.krypto-insights.de

]]>

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in f√Љhrenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir √Љber die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die m√ґgliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spa√Я beim Zuh√ґren!

Zudem reden wir auch noch √Љber die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- L√ґsungen f√Љr eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik √Љberhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einf√Љhrt

- Bitcoin St√§dte Spiel: Errate die f√Љnf beliebtesten Bitcoin St√§dte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben ver√§ndert hat

- Glaskugel: Bitcoin Preis am Ende des Jahres 2025Podcast Folge auf Spotify:

---------------------------------------------------------------------

https://open.spotify.com/show/0bhDawE23ld6lPw7KnqUH5?si=5182b2525e7144db

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Vernetz dich gerne mit den Rednern :)

LinkedIn Konsti Schwemlein: https://www.linkedin.com/in/konstantin-schwemlein/

--------------------------------------------------------------

TimeStamps:

00:00 Intro

01:15 Wie bist du zu Bitcoin gekommen?

07:45 Thema Bitcoin: Bev√ґlkerung vs. Unternehmen/Politik

12:46 Was sind deine Verbesserungsvorschl√§ge?

15:15 Wie kann die deutsche Politik Bitcoin integrieren?

17:28 Gleicht eine Bitcoin Reserve die Staatsschulden aus?

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вАУ Roundtable_021 - The Fight is Never Over
item.description:
The whole crew is back for another roundtable, and things get wild right out of the gate. I sat down with Steve, Mechanic, and Jeff to talk through the absolute mess that is the current state of things. Jeff shares an update on his Canadian immigration purgatory, which spirals into a bigger conversation about living like an outlaw and whether any of us are truly free from the system.

But we couldn't ignore the recent news. We talk about the crazy story of a guy who used Claude to brute-force a lost Bitcoin wallet from eleven years ago. It really makes you rethink how safe your standard passphrases actually are, and we share some wild visual memory tricks to secure your setup. We also rip into the current hype around ETF inflows and outflows. People track these numbers like they are predicting the future, but we explain why they really just tell you exactly what the market already did.

And of course, we had to get into the technical fights that never seem to end. Steve brings some fresh data exposing the true bimodal distribution of network users right now. We spend a good amount of time arguing about Taproot, chain bloat, and the massive confusion between true censorship and simply stopping spam. Mechanic lays out his latest case for BIP 110 and makes a really compelling point about why the healthiest participants for the network are actually the ones willing to mine at a complete technical loss. It sounds completely backward, but it makes total sense once you hear his breakdown.

We wrap things up by looking at the broader picture of decentralised movements. From Occupy Wall Street falling apart to the current crop of hijacked political factions, we ask if it is even possible to build a movement without a vulnerable central leader. Plus, we drop some thoughts on local LLMs and the ongoing Prime Trust bankruptcy drama.

Guest Links

  • Steve Simple Nostr (Link:¬†https://tinyurl.com/3s6a8yn8)
  • Steve Simple on X¬†(Link: https://x.com/stevesimple)
  • Bitcoin Mechanic Nostr (Link: https://tinyurl.com/2tm827ut)
  • Bitcoin Mechanic on X (Link:¬†https://x.com/GrassFedBitcoin)
  • Jeff Swann Nostr (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3sjc3bcp)
  • Jeff Swann on X (Link: https://x.com/agoristview)
  • Jeff Swann's petition (Link: https://www.change.org/p/help-us-home)

  • вБ†Guy on Nostr вБ†(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
